reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Es una parada ideal para descansar sobre todo si llevás niños, hay juegos y mesas con sillas para comer. Tiene todo lo que necesitarías para viajar

(Translated by Google)
It's an ideal stop to rest, especially if you're bringing children. There are games and tables with chairs for eating. It has everything you need for your trip.

reviews.comment:
Situado a la vera de la Autovía 2 es un hermoso lugar de recreación y esparcimiento para turistas y Dolorenses . Excelente atención. Parada obligada para un descanso y un snack a mitad de camino.  Mardel-BsAs

(Translated by Google)
Located right off Highway 2, it's a beautiful spot for recreation and leisure for tourists and locals alike. Excellent service. A must-stop for a break and a snack halfway between Mar del Plata and Buenos Aires.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ4bjdTUWd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención!! Cerrada en el acceso a Dolores. Se puede cargar desde ruta o desde la localidad sin conectar ambos lugares.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! The access road to Dolores is closed. You can charge from the highway or from the town without connecting both locations.
